title: Session 11 — Following the Vines
bodyText:
# What happened
Days of vine-guided travel. **Shared dream** (Trunks, Varen, Eddy): pitchfork through the gut at a dark river; a cloaked woman (a lock of **red hair**) draining herself trying to heal them; a blank-faced **white-haired girl** walking away; then engulfed by something cold and gelatinous. That night Varen's trance was invaded — *"Return to the embrace of the web and bring the light-bearer... what comes for you will bring you both back in pieces"* — while **Eddy watched a horned figure materialize above Varen** and leave an obsidian stone (eight-pointed star; crumbled to dust). Also revealed: **Trunks knows Cumb and "Mr. Spells."**
